mapper.select: SELECT p.station_id, s.name AS station_name, c.region, s.sort_index, p.biz_date, p.time_slot, p.forecast_type, p.predicted_power_kw, p.upper_bound_kw, p.lower_bound_kw, p.scenario_tag FROM fc_prediction_series_15m p JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = p.station_id JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id WHERE p.biz_date = #{bizDate} ORDER BY s.sort_index, p.forecast_type, p.time_slot
